# Tanso

> Open-source billing, metering, and entitlement platform. Your backend checks an entitlement before serving a feature and reports usage after; Tanso enforces limits, generates invoices, syncs with Stripe when connected, and computes per-customer margins.

Tanso is open source under AGPL-3.0 at https://github.com/tansohq/tanso-oss and is self-hostable with Docker Compose.

You use your own customer IDs everywhere — no ID sync, no webhook plumbing, no custom billing logic in your codebase.

This file is a concise index of the documentation. For the full text of every page in a single file, see [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt). All docs are served as plain text — agent-ready, with no login required.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](./introduction.md): What Tanso does, the two-call integration pattern, and the core concepts.
- [Quickstart](./quickstart.md): Check an entitlement and send your first usage event in a few minutes.

## Core Documentation

- [Product Catalog](./product-catalog.md): Define features, plans, pricing models (flat, usage, graduated), and cost models.
- [Entitlements](./entitlements.md): Real-time feature gating — one call returns allow or deny, accounting for usage and credit limits.
- [Usage Metering & Events](./usage-metering-and-events.md): Report usage events with idempotency keys that drive billing and analytics.
- [Billing & Invoicing](./billing-and-invoicing.md): Invoice types, the status lifecycle, line items, and marking invoices paid.
- [Customers & Subscriptions](./customers-and-subscriptions.md): Register customers, subscribe them to plans, and handle upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations.
- [Credits](./credits.md): Pre-paid credit pools with grants, hard limits, rollover policies, and an immutable audit ledger.

## Integrations

- [Stripe Integration](./stripe-integration.md): Connect Stripe for payment collection, checkout sessions, and webhook-driven entitlement activation.
- [Settings & API Authentication](./settings-and-roles.md): API key authentication, key rotation, and the multi-tenant security model.

## Reference

- [API Reference (OpenAPI)](./clientAPI/openapi.yaml): The full Client API specification.
- [MCP Server](../README.md): Built-in MCP server for AI agent integration — enable it in config and connect any MCP-compatible client.
- [TypeScript SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tansohq/sdk): Official Node.js client with full types.

## Optional

- [FAQ & Troubleshooting](./faq-and-troubleshooting.md): Common integration questions and fixes.
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): The complete documentation flattened into a single file.
